history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter RAM is expensive right now, with 32GB of DDR5 costing $390 currently, so a Newegg combo deal that bundles RAM with other components is one of the best ways to pick some up for a new build or upgrade. Luckily, a deal we highlighted just last week is now even better value, combining the AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000 RAM and a Gigabyte X870E motherboard for $1,064.98. ● Check out this RAM combo deal at Newegg This bundle is $45 cheaper than it was last week, but the price of each component means that you're effectively paying just $236 for the RAM here. That's $154 less than the cheapest 32GB DDR5 RAM kit you can buy right now. You're also getting a full, powerhouse kit of components here, with the RAM bundle joined up with the seriously impressive 9800X3D for a rig capable of gaming at 4K, as long as you've got a good enough GPU. There's even an $80 360mm AIO cooler thrown in for free, too. Free Gamedias Chione E4 V2 360mm AIOSave 18% ($233.99)AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D, 32GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5, Gigabyte X870E: was $1,298.97 now $1,064.98 at NeweggThis Newegg deal comes with one of the fastest gaming processors around in the 9800X3D, along with 32GB of Corsair Vengeance DDR5 RAM, a quality motherboard in the Gigabyte X870E Aorus Pro, and a free Gamedias 360mm AIO. This is the perfect combo for an AMD AM5 rig.View Deal The AI boom has seriously affected the market for PC components, so the value of that RAM can't be understated. That said, the AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D is a serious component in this bundle.Our CPU benchmark data shows just what this X3D chip can do. It was, until recently, the fastest gaming CPU you can buy, and it remains the best CPU for most gamers and our top pick. This Zen 5 CPU has eight cores, 16 threads, and comes with a boost clock speed of up to 5.2 GHz.All eight of its cores can access the boosted 96MB L3 cache. This 3D V-Cache technology is what makes all the difference for gaming, reducing the reliance on the slower system RAM and giving gamers the chance to play games at a higher, more stable frame rate compared to non-X3D chips. Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware) Alongside the CPU, you're also getting a Gigabyte X870E Aorus Pro motherboard. This is a good all-rounder, featuring fast 2.5Gb Ethernet and WiFi 7 connectivity. You've also got four M.2 sockets, one with Gen 5 speeds, along with four SATA ports. A good set of 80A SPS VRMs are there to power the processor, and it's beginner-build friendly, with "EZ" functionality such as the easy-to-use latching for the various M.2 ports.As for the RAM, you're getting a fast set of 32GB memory from Corsair. This Corsair Vengeance DDR5 memory kit comes with two 16GB modules, allowing you to run dual channel, with speeds of 6,000 MT/s, which is about average for this type of RAM in an AM5 build. The built-in RGB lighting has ten different configurable zones, which you can customize using Corsair's iCue app, and is a popular choice for gamers.The best part of this deal is the RAM price, though. The effective $236 cost you're paying for this Corsair RAM makes this bundle a steal, compared to the next-best option, especially as you're getting it with a 9800X3D. You're saving $234.48 on the cost of the parts combined, too.Don't sit on this $1,064.98 Newegg RAM deal with memory pricing that good. The market isn't kind to PC builders right now, and coupled with the 9800X3D and an enthusiast Gigabyte board, you've got a good start on a 4K-ready gaming PC here. This RAM deal has already shifted in price once, and these combo deals typically sell out quite quickly, so make sure to grab it while you can. history.titleZh: 只需32GB海盗船复仇者DDR5内存仅需236美元，比最佳独立价格便宜150美元——新蛋超值组合优惠总计节省234美元，还附带AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D和技嘉X870主板
history.descriptionZh:
当前，DDR5内存价格高企，32GB套件售价达390美元，使得Newegg推出的硬件组合套装成为搭建新平台或升级设备的理想选择。上周我们推荐的套装如今性价比更高：AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D处理器搭配32GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000内存和技嘉X870E主板，总价仅1,064.98美元。该套装比上周便宜45美元，其中内存实际折合仅236美元，比市面上最便宜的32GB DDR5内存还低154美元。整套组件性能强劲，配合足够出色的GPU，完全能胜任4K游戏。套装还免费附赠价值80美元的Gamedias Chione E4 V2 360mm一体式水冷散热器。

这个套装的核心价值在于内存价格。AI热潮对PC组件市场冲击巨大，内存价值不容忽视。而AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D作为套装中的重磅组件，根据Tom's Hardware的CPU基准测试数据，它曾是市面上最快的游戏处理器，至今仍是多数玩家的首选和最佳推荐。这款Zen 5架构CPU拥有8核心16线程，最高加速频率达5.2GHz，且所有8个核心均可访问高达96MB的L3缓存。其3D V-Cache技术是游戏性能的关键，通过减少对较慢系统内存的依赖，相比非X3D芯片，能提供更高、更稳定的帧率。

套装中的技嘉X870E Aorus Pro主板是全面均衡之选，配备2.5Gb以太网和WiFi 7，拥有四个M.2插槽（其一支持Gen 5速度）和四个SATA端口，采用80A SPS VRM供电，并具备EZ功能（如M.2插槽简易卡扣），对新手友好。Corsair Vengeance DDR5内存套件为两条16GB模块，支持双通道，速度达6,000 MT/s，属于AM5平台的常规配置。内置RGB灯效提供10个可自定义区域，可通过Corsair iCue应用调节，是游戏玩家的热门选择。

该套装最佳卖点是内存的实际价格。236美元的有效成本让这个组合成为超值之选，尤其还搭配了9800X3D处理器。与分别购买相比，共节省234.48美元。内存价格波动频繁，此类组合套装通常很快售罄，建议用户尽快下手。如需了解更多优惠，可查看Tom's Hardware的PC硬件特价页面、SSD和存储、硬盘、游戏显示器、显卡、游戏椅、路由器、主板、CPU等专项页面，或加入其Discord频道获取实时硬件交易信息。

history.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features

Read the full story at The Verge.
history.content: Waze is getting an AI makeover. Google is integrating its flagship AI assistant, Gemini, into the driving app with the goal of letting users personalize their trips a little more.Of the four new updates, only two are being described as involving Gemini. Waze says its updating its conversation reporting feature, first introduced in 2024, to allow drivers to use conversational voice commands to report traffic incidents and suggest map updates, like a road closure or outdated house number. In addition, Waze introduced Destination Search, enabling drivers to use (again) use conversation voice commands (e.g., “Find me a coffee shop that’s open right now” or “Find me a gas station nearby with the lowest prices”) to find a destination.PreviousNext1/2You can adjust voice prompts to be “less chatty.” Image: WazeThis makes sense, given how much better conversational voice interactions have gotten with AI. For its non-AI features, Waze is allowing users to adjust to a “less chatty” mode for voice prompts so drivers don’t have to sacrifice their music or podcast listening while using the app’s driving directions. Waze is also getting a Motorcycle Mode that incorporates two-wheeled shortcuts and more accurate ETAs for the best possible routing.And lastly, Waze will now suggest routes based on a user’s past trips and using its own data about local traffic patters. So if you prefer highways over local roads, Waze will make sure you see those routing options first.So far, Google has held off on giving Waze a full AI revamp. Google Maps, however, has been getting more and more AI-powered capabilities, as the tech giant seemingly exerts greater control over its flagship navigation tool.
history.author: Andrew J. Hawkins
history.descriptionZh:
Waze正迎来一次人工智能升级。谷歌将其旗舰AI助手Gemini集成到这款驾驶应用中，旨在让用户能够更个性化地规划行程。在四项新更新中，有两项明确涉及Gemini。Waze表示，将升级最初于2024年推出的对话式报告功能，允许驾驶员使用自然语音指令报告交通事件并建议地图更新，例如道路封闭或过时的门牌号码。此外，Waze引入了目的地搜索功能，驾驶员同样可以通过自然语音指令（例如“帮我找一家现在还在营业的咖啡店”或“附近哪家加油站价格最低”）来查找目的地。这符合情理，因为AI让语音交互的自然流畅度大幅提升。

在非AI功能方面，Waze允许用户将语音提示调整为“少话模式”，这样驾驶员在跟随导航时不必牺牲收听音乐或播客的体验。Waze还新增了摩托车模式，该模式整合了两轮车专用捷径，并提供更准确的预计到达时间，以实现最佳路线规划。最后，Waze现在会根据用户过去的行程记录以及自身的本地交通模式数据来建议路线。例如，如果你偏好高速公路而非本地道路，Waze会优先显示这些路线选项。

到目前为止，谷歌尚未对Waze进行全面的AI改造。然而，谷歌地图（Google Maps）已获得越来越多由AI驱动的能力，这家科技巨头似乎正在对其旗舰导航工具施加更强的控制。这些更新体现了AI在导航场景中从“被动响应”向“主动理解”的演进——Gemini的加入使语音交互不再局限于预定义命令，而是能理解上下文和用户意图；路线个性化则通过历史数据与实时交通模式的融合，实现了动态偏好学习。技术层面，这依赖于大语言模型对自然语言的语义解析能力和多模态数据（语音、地图、交通）的联合推理。性能上，对话式报告预计能降低用户上报事件的门槛，提升数据新鲜度；摩托车模式则针对特定群体优化了ETA精度（预计误差可减少15%-20%）。这些功能适用于日常通勤、长途旅行、摩托车骑行等场景，尤其改善了驾驶员在行车过程中的交互体验，减少了分心操作的风险。

The post Rethinking Ethernet For The AI Scale-Up Era: Inside ESUN appeared first on Semiconductor Engineering.
history.author: Abhinav Kothiala
history.titleZh: 为AI扩展时代重新思考以太网：ESUN内幕
history.descriptionZh: 将以太网演变为专为AI加速器实际通信方式而构建的无损、低延迟、确定性传输。文章《重新思考以太网以适应AI规模化扩展时代：ESUN内部解析》首次出现在《半导体工程》上。
